headline: Research Tools & Consumables Stocks Q1 In Review: Revvity (NYSE:RVTY) Vs Peers
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at research tools & consumables stocks, starting with Revvity (NYSE:RVTY).
